  shape = "circle", alpha = 0.5,
  size = 2
 ) +
 ggplot2::stat_ellipse(
  ggplot2::aes(colour = Sample_type_DETAILED)
 )

dev.off()



pdf("MICROVIZ_ORDINATION_Genus_BRAY_PCoA_DETAILED_NOURIS_STATE.pdf")

physeq_filtered_preva %>% #tax_fix(unknowns = c("Unknown Family"))
 tax_transform(rank = "Genus", trans = "compositional") %>%
 dist_calc(dist = "bray") %>%
 ord_calc(
  method = "PCoA"
 ) %>% 
 ord_plot(
  axes = c(1, 2),
  colour = "Sample_type_DETAILED", fill = "Sample_type_DETAILED",
  shape = "circle", alpha = 0.5,
  size = 2
 ) +
 ggplot2::stat_ellipse(
  ggplot2::aes(colour = NUT_STAT)
 )

dev.off()




#NOW WORKING WITH NEW METADATA
pdf("MICROVIZ_ORDINATION_phylum_BRAY_PCoA_NUT_STAT.pdf")

physeq_filtered %>% #tax_fix() %>% tax_fix(unknowns = c("Incertae Sedis", "Unknown Family Family")) %>% tax_fix(unknowns = c("Unknown Family Family")) %>%
 tax_transform(rank = "Phylum", trans = "compositional") %>%
 dist_calc(dist = "bray") %>%
 ord_calc(
  method = "PCoA"
 ) %>% 
 ord_plot(
  axes = c(1, 2),
  colour = "NUT_STAT", fill = "NUT_STAT",
  shape = "circle", alpha = 0.5,
  size = 2
 ) +
 ggplot2::stat_ellipse(
  ggplot2::aes(colour = Sample_type_DETAILED)
 )

dev.off()



# OTHER VERSION
pdf("MICROVIZ_ORDINATION_phylum_BRAY_PCoA_NUT_STAT_ONLY.pdf", width=12, height = 12)

physeq_filtered %>% #tax_fix() %>% tax_fix(unknowns = c("Incertae Sedis", "Unknown Family Family")) %>% tax_fix(unknowns = c("Unknown Family Family")) %>%
 tax_transform(rank = "Phylum", trans = "compositional") %>%
 dist_calc(dist = "bray") %>%
 ord_calc(
  method = "PCoA"
 ) %>% 
 ord_plot(
  axes = c(1, 2),
  colour = "NUT_STAT_DETAILED", fill = "NUT_STAT_DETAILED",
  shape = "NUT_STAT", alpha = 0.5,
  size = 2
 ) #+
# ggplot2::stat_ellipse(
#  ggplot2::aes(colour = Sample_type)
# )

dev.off()

# OTHER VERSION WITH ELLIPSES
pdf("MICROVIZ_ORDINATION_phylum_BRAY_PCoA_NUT_STAT_ONLY_ELLIPSE.pdf", width=12, height = 12)

physeq_filtered %>% #tax_fix() %>% tax_fix(unknowns = c("Incertae Sedis", "Unknown Family Family")) %>% tax_fix(unknowns = c("Unknown Family Family")) %>%
 tax_transform(rank = "Phylum", trans = "compositional") %>%
 dist_calc(dist = "bray") %>%
 ord_calc(
  method = "PCoA"
 ) %>% 
 ord_plot(
  axes = c(1, 2),
  colour = "Sample_type", fill = "Sample_type",
  shape = "NUT_STAT_DETAILED", alpha = 0.5,
  size = 2
 ) +
 ggplot2::stat_ellipse(
  ggplot2::aes(colour = Sample_type)
 )

dev.off()




### YET ANOTHER VERSION
### THIS ONE PARRTICULARILY INTERESTING FOR OUR BILE ACID ANALYSES (Phylum)

pdf("V3_PLOT_ACCORDING_TO_COND_BOXPLOT_TREATMENT_PHYLUM.pdf", width=100, height = 500)

taxa_physeq_filtered_phylum_relabun %>% 
  ggplot(aes(x =Sample_type, y = Abundance, fill = Sample_type)) +
  geom_boxplot() +
  labs(x = "",
       y = "Relative Abundance",
       title = "Phylum Relative Abundance") +
  facet_wrap(NUT_STAT~Phylum, scales= "free_x", ncol=10) +
  theme(
    axis.text.x = element_text(size = 10, angle = 90, vjust = 0.5, hjust = 1),
    axis.text.y = element_text(size = 12),
    legend.text = element_text(size = 10),
    strip.text = element_text(size = 12)
  )

dev.off()


### THIS ONE PARRTICULARILY INTERESTING FOR OUR BILE ACID ANALYSES (Class)

# Merge everything to the Class level
physeq_filtered_Class <- tax_glom(physeq_filtered, "Class", NArm = TRUE)

#View(physeq_filtered_Class) 

# Transform Taxa counts to relative abundance
physeq_filtered_Class_relabun <- transform_sample_counts(physeq_filtered_Class , function(OTU) OTU/sum(OTU) * 100)

#Then extract the data from the phyloseq object:
taxa_physeq_filtered_Class_relabun <- psmelt(physeq_filtered_Class_relabun)



pdf("V3_PLOT_ACCORDING_TO_COND_BOXPLOT_TREATMENT_Class.pdf", width=30, height = 50)

taxa_physeq_filtered_Class_relabun %>% 
  ggplot(aes(x =Sample_type, y = Abundance, fill = Sample_type)) +
  geom_boxplot() +
  labs(x = "",
       y = "Relative Abundance",
       title = "Class Relative Abundance") +
  facet_wrap(TREATMENT~Class, scales= "free_x", nrow=4) +
  theme(
    axis.text.x = element_text(size = 10, angle = 90, vjust = 0.5, hjust = 1),
    axis.text.y = element_text(size = 12),
    legend.text = element_text(size = 10),
    strip.text = element_text(size = 12)
  )

dev.off()


pdf("V3_PLOT_ACCORDING_TO_COND_BOXPLOT_TREATMENT_Class_less_than_5PERC.pdf", width=30, height = 50)

taxa_physeq_filtered_Class_relabun %>% 
  ggplot(aes(x =Sample_type, y = Abundance, fill = Sample_type)) +
  geom_boxplot() +
  labs(x = "",
       y = "Relative Abundance",
       title = "Class Relative Abundance") +
  ylim(0, 5) +
  facet_wrap(TREATMENT~Class, scales= "free_x", nrow=4) +
  theme(
    axis.text.x = element_text(size = 10, angle = 90, vjust = 0.5, hjust = 1),
    axis.text.y = element_text(size = 12),
    legend.text = element_text(size = 10),
    strip.text = element_text(size = 12)
  )

dev.off()


pdf("V3_PLOT_ACCORDING_TO_COND_BOXPLOT_TREATMENT_Class_less_than_0dot5_PERC.pdf", width=30, height = 50)

taxa_physeq_filtered_Class_relabun %>% 
  ggplot(aes(x =Sample_type, y = Abundance, fill = Sample_type)) +
  geom_boxplot() +
  labs(x = "",
       y = "Relative Abundance",
       title = "Class Relative Abundance") +
  ylim(0, 0.5) +
  facet_wrap(TREATMENT~Class, scales= "free_x", nrow=4) +
  theme(
    axis.text.x = element_text(size = 10, angle = 90, vjust = 0.5, hjust = 1),
    axis.text.y = element_text(size = 12),
    legend.text = element_text(size = 10),
    strip.text = element_text(size = 12)
  )

dev.off()


pdf("V3_PLOT_ACCORDING_TO_COND_BOXPLOT_TREATMENT_Class_less_than_005_PERC.pdf", width=30, height = 50)

taxa_physeq_filtered_Class_relabun %>% 
  ggplot(aes(x =Sample_type, y = Abundance, fill = Sample_type)) +
  geom_boxplot() +
  labs(x = "",
       y = "Relative Abundance",
       title = "Class Relative Abundance") +
  ylim(0, 0.005) +
  facet_wrap(TREATMENT~Class, scales= "free_x", nrow=4) +
  theme(
    axis.text.x = element_text(size = 10, angle = 90, vjust = 0.5, hjust = 1),
    axis.text.y = element_text(size = 12),
    legend.text = element_text(size = 10),
    strip.text = element_text(size = 12)
  )

dev.off()



# make a baTREATMENT heatmap
#pdf("BATREATMENT_PRESENCE_ABSENCE_HEATMAP_ALL_SAMPLES.pdf", width = 20, height=20)
pdf("BATREATMENT_HEATMAP_Class.pdf")

phyloseq::plot_heatmap(physeq_filtered_Class, "PCoA", "bray", taxa.label="Class", low="Red", high="Blue", na.value="white", title = "Class Level Heatmap PCoA-Bray") +
theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = -80, hjust = 0, vjust=0.5))
dev.off()




### THIS ONE PARRTICULARILY INTERESTING FOR OUR BILE ACID ANALYSES (Family)


# Merge everything to the Family level
physeq_filtered_Family <- tax_glom(physeq_filtered, "Family", NArm = TRUE)

#View(physeq_filtered_Family) 

# Transform Taxa counts to relative abundance
physeq_filtered_Family_relabun <- transform_sample_counts(physeq_filtered_Family , function(OTU) OTU/sum(OTU) * 100)

#Then extract the data from the phyloseq object:
taxa_physeq_filtered_Family_relabun <- psmelt(physeq_filtered_Family_relabun)

# Sample_type

pdf("V3_PLOT_ACCORDING_TO_COND_BOXPLOT_TREATMENT_Family.pdf", width=140, height = 60)

taxa_physeq_filtered_Family_relabun %>% 
  ggplot(aes(x =Sample_type, y = Abundance, fill = Sample_type)) +
  geom_boxplot() +
  labs(x = "",
       y = "Relative Abundance",
       title = "Family Relative Abundance") +
  facet_wrap(TREATMENT~Family, scales= "free_x", nrow=4) +
  theme(
    axis.text.x = element_text(size = 10, angle = 90, vjust = 0.5, hjust = 1),
    axis.text.y = element_text(size = 12),
    legend.text = element_text(size = 10),
    strip.text = element_text(size = 12)
  )

dev.off()


pdf("V3_PLOT_ACCORDING_TO_COND_BOXPLOT_TREATMENT_Family_less_than_5PERC.pdf", width=140, height = 60)

taxa_physeq_filtered_Family_relabun %>% 
  ggplot(aes(x =Sample_type, y = Abundance, fill = Sample_type)) +
  geom_boxplot() +
  labs(x = "",
       y = "Relative Abundance",
       title = "Family Relative Abundance") +
  ylim(0, 5) +
  facet_wrap(TREATMENT~Family, scales= "free_x", nrow=4) +
  theme(
    axis.text.x = element_text(size = 10, angle = 90, vjust = 0.5, hjust = 1),
    axis.text.y = element_text(size = 12),
    legend.text = element_text(size = 10),
    strip.text = element_text(size = 12)
  )

dev.off()


pdf("V3_PLOT_ACCORDING_TO_COND_BOXPLOT_TREATMENT_Family_less_than_0dot5_PERC.pdf", width=140, height = 60)

taxa_physeq_filtered_Family_relabun %>% 
  ggplot(aes(x =Sample_type, y = Abundance, fill = Sample_type)) +
  geom_boxplot() +
  labs(x = "",
       y = "Relative Abundance",
       title = "Family Relative Abundance") +
  ylim(0, 0.5) +
  facet_wrap(TREATMENT~Family, scales= "free_x", nrow=4) +
  theme(
    axis.text.x = element_text(size = 10, angle = 90, vjust = 0.5, hjust = 1),
    axis.text.y = element_text(size = 12),
    legend.text = element_text(size = 10),
    strip.text = element_text(size = 12)
  )

dev.off()

pdf("V3_PLOT_ACCORDING_TO_COND_BOXPLOT_TREATMENT_Family_less_than_0dot05_PERC.pdf", width=140, height = 60)

taxa_physeq_filtered_Family_relabun %>% 
  ggplot(aes(x =Sample_type, y = Abundance, fill = Sample_type)) +
  geom_boxplot() +
  labs(x = "",
       y = "Relative Abundance",
       title = "Family Relative Abundance") +
  ylim(0, 0.05) +
  facet_wrap(TREATMENT~Family, scales= "free_x", nrow=4) +
  theme(
    axis.text.x = element_text(size = 10, angle = 90, vjust = 0.5, hjust = 1),
    axis.text.y = element_text(size = 12),
    legend.text = element_text(size = 10),
    strip.text = element_text(size = 12)
  )

dev.off()



pdf("V3_PLOT_ACCORDING_TO_COND_BOXPLOT_TREATMENT_Family_less_than_0dot005_PERC.pdf", width=140, height = 60)

taxa_physeq_filtered_Family_relabun %>% 
  ggplot(aes(x =Sample_type, y = Abundance, fill = Sample_type)) +
  geom_boxplot() +
  labs(x = "",
       y = "Relative Abundance",
       title = "Family Relative Abundance") +
  ylim(0, 0.005) +
  facet_wrap(TREATMENT~Family, scales= "free_x", nrow=4) +
  theme(
    axis.text.x = element_text(size = 10, angle = 90, vjust = 0.5, hjust = 1),
    axis.text.y = element_text(size = 12),
    legend.text = element_text(size = 10),
    strip.text = element_text(size = 12)
  )

dev.off()


pdf("V3_PLOT_ACCORDING_TO_COND_BOXPLOT_TREATMENT_Family_less_than_0dot0005_PERC.pdf", width=140, height = 60)

taxa_physeq_filtered_Family_relabun %>% 
  ggplot(aes(x =Sample_type, y = Abundance, fill = Sample_type)) +
  geom_boxplot() +
  labs(x = "",
       y = "Relative Abundance",
       title = "Family Relative Abundance") +
  ylim(0, 0.0005) +
  facet_wrap(TREATMENT~Family, scales= "free_x", nrow=4) +
  theme(
    axis.text.x = element_text(size = 10, angle = 90, vjust = 0.5, hjust = 1),
    axis.text.y = element_text(size = 12),
    legend.text = element_text(size = 10),
    strip.text = element_text(size = 12)
  )

dev.off()





pdf("V3_PLOT_ACCORDING_TO_COND_BOXPLOT_TREATMENT_Family_less_than_0dot00005_PERC.pdf", width=140, height = 60)

taxa_physeq_filtered_Family_relabun %>% 
  ggplot(aes(x =Sample_type, y = Abundance, fill = Sample_type)) +
  geom_boxplot() +
  labs(x = "",
       y = "Relative Abundance",
       title = "Family Relative Abundance") +
  ylim(0, 0.00005) +
  facet_wrap(TREATMENT~Family, scales= "free_x", nrow=4) +
  theme(
    axis.text.x = element_text(size = 10, angle = 90, vjust = 0.5, hjust = 1),
    axis.text.y = element_text(size = 12),
    legend.text = element_text(size = 10),
    strip.text = element_text(size = 12)
  )

dev.off()


# Sample_type_DETAILED



pdf("V3_PLOT_ACCORDING_TO_COND_BOXPLOT_TREATMENT_Family.pdf", width=140, height = 60)

taxa_physeq_filtered_Family_relabun %>% 
  ggplot(aes(x =Sample_type_DETAILED, y = Abundance, fill = Sample_type_DETAILED)) +
  geom_boxplot() +
  labs(x = "",
       y = "Relative Abundance",
       title = "Family Relative Abundance") +
  facet_wrap(TREATMENT~Family, scales= "free_x", nrow=4) +
  theme(
    axis.text.x = element_text(size = 10, angle = 90, vjust = 0.5, hjust = 1),
    axis.text.y = element_text(size = 12),
    legend.text = element_text(size = 10),
    strip.text = element_text(size = 12)
  )

dev.off()


pdf("V3_PLOT_ACCORDING_TO_COND_BOXPLOT_TREATMENT_Family_less_than_5PERC.pdf", width=140, height = 60)

taxa_physeq_filtered_Family_relabun %>% 
  ggplot(aes(x =Sample_type_DETAILED, y = Abundance, fill = Sample_type_DETAILED)) +
  geom_boxplot() +
  labs(x = "",
       y = "Relative Abundance",
       title = "Family Relative Abundance") +
  ylim(0, 5) +
  facet_wrap(TREATMENT~Family, scales= "free_x", nrow=4) +
  theme(
    axis.text.x = element_text(size = 10, angle = 90, vjust = 0.5, hjust = 1),
    axis.text.y = element_text(size = 12),
    legend.text = element_text(size = 10),
    strip.text = element_text(size = 12)
  )

dev.off()


pdf("V3_PLOT_ACCORDING_TO_COND_BOXPLOT_TREATMENT_Family_less_than_0dot5_PERC.pdf", width=140, height = 60)

taxa_physeq_filtered_Family_relabun %>% 
  ggplot(aes(x =Sample_type_DETAILED, y = Abundance, fill = Sample_type_DETAILED)) +
  geom_boxplot() +
  labs(x = "",
       y = "Relative Abundance",
       title = "Family Relative Abundance") +
  ylim(0, 0.5) +
  facet_wrap(TREATMENT~Family, scales= "free_x", nrow=4) +
  theme(
    axis.text.x = element_text(size = 10, angle = 90, vjust = 0.5, hjust = 1),
    axis.text.y = element_text(size = 12),
    legend.text = element_text(size = 10),
    strip.text = element_text(size = 12)
  )

dev.off()

pdf("V3_PLOT_ACCORDING_TO_COND_BOXPLOT_TREATMENT_Family_less_than_0dot05_PERC.pdf", width=140, height = 60)

taxa_physeq_filtered_Family_relabun %>% 
  ggplot(aes(x =Sample_type_DETAILED, y = Abundance, fill = Sample_type_DETAILED)) +
  geom_boxplot() +
  labs(x = "",
       y = "Relative Abundance",
       title = "Family Relative Abundance") +
  ylim(0, 0.05) +
  facet_wrap(TREATMENT~Family, scales= "free_x", nrow=4) +
  theme(
    axis.text.x = element_text(size = 10, angle = 90, vjust = 0.5, hjust = 1),
    axis.text.y = element_text(size = 12),
    legend.text = element_text(size = 10),
    strip.text = element_text(size = 12)
  )

dev.off()



pdf("V3_PLOT_ACCORDING_TO_COND_BOXPLOT_TREATMENT_Family_less_than_0dot005_PERC.pdf", width=140, height = 60)

taxa_physeq_filtered_Family_relabun %>% 
  ggplot(aes(x =Sample_type_DETAILED, y = Abundance, fill = Sample_type_DETAILED)) +
  geom_boxplot() +
  labs(x = "",
       y = "Relative Abundance",
       title = "Family Relative Abundance") +
  ylim(0, 0.005) +
  facet_wrap(TREATMENT~Family, scales= "free_x", nrow=4) +
  theme(
    axis.text.x = element_text(size = 10, angle = 90, vjust = 0.5, hjust = 1),
    axis.text.y = element_text(size = 12),
    legend.text = element_text(size = 10),
    strip.text = element_text(size = 12)
  )

dev.off()


pdf("V3_PLOT_ACCORDING_TO_COND_BOXPLOT_TREATMENT_Family_less_than_0dot0005_PERC.pdf", width=140, height = 60)

taxa_physeq_filtered_Family_relabun %>% 
  ggplot(aes(x =Sample_type_DETAILED, y = Abundance, fill = Sample_type_DETAILED)) +
  geom_boxplot() +
  labs(x = "",
       y = "Relative Abundance",
       title = "Family Relative Abundance") +
  ylim(0, 0.0005) +
  facet_wrap(TREATMENT~Family, scales= "free_x", nrow=4) +
  theme(
    axis.text.x = element_text(size = 10, angle = 90, vjust = 0.5, hjust = 1),
    axis.text.y = element_text(size = 12),
    legend.text = element_text(size = 10),
    strip.text = element_text(size = 12)
  )

dev.off()





pdf("V3_PLOT_ACCORDING_TO_COND_BOXPLOT_TREATMENT_Family_less_than_0dot00005_PERC.pdf", width=140, height = 60)

taxa_physeq_filtered_Family_relabun %>% 
  ggplot(aes(x =Sample_type_DETAILED, y = Abundance, fill = Sample_type_DETAILED)) +
  geom_boxplot() +
  labs(x = "",
       y = "Relative Abundance",
       title = "Family Relative Abundance") +
  ylim(0, 0.00005) +
  facet_wrap(TREATMENT~Family, scales= "free_x", nrow=4) +
  theme(
    axis.text.x = element_text(size = 10, angle = 90, vjust = 0.5, hjust = 1),
    axis.text.y = element_text(size = 12),
    legend.text = element_text(size = 10),
    strip.text = element_text(size = 12)
  )

dev.off()


######################
######################


###################################
#TEST PLOT ONLY SPECIFIC Phylum
###################################

physeq_filtered.rel = transform_sample_counts(physeq_filtered, function(x) x/sum(x)*100)

some_Phylum <- physeq_filtered.rel
some_Phylum <- tax_glom(some_Phylum, "Phylum")
#tax_table(some_Phylum)[,6]

some_Phylum <- subset_taxa(some_Phylum, Phylum == "Bactroidota"| Phylum == "Firmicutes" 
                        | Phylum == "Proteobacteria" | Phylum == "Actinobacteriota" | Phylum == "Fusobacteriota" | Phylum == "Verrucomicrobiota")

some_Phylum <- psmelt(some_Phylum)

#Sample_type

# Plot  
# x = "", color ="", , facet~wrap and comparison list can be modify
pdf("Selected_Phylum_NO_SCALE_Sample_type.pdf", width = 30, height = 40)
ggplot(some_Phylum, aes(x = Sample_type, y = Abundance)) +
  geom_boxplot() +
  #geom_point(aes(color = TREATMENT)) +
  geom_jitter(aes(colour = CONCENTRATION), shape=16,size = 2, position=position_jitter(0.2)) +
  #ylim(0, 5) +
  facet_wrap(TREATMENT~Phylum, ncol =5) +
  theme_bw() +
  theme(text = element_text(size = 20)) +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = -80, hjust = 0, vjust=0.5)) +
  ggtitle("Relative abundance of selected Phylum") +
  ylab("Relative abundance")
dev.off()


# Plot  
# x = "", color ="", , facet~wrap and comparison list can be modify
pdf("Selected_Phylum_MAX_10_ABUND_Sample_type.pdf", width = 30, height = 40)
ggplot(some_Phylum, aes(x = Sample_type, y = Abundance)) +
  geom_boxplot() +
  #geom_point(aes(color = TREATMENT)) +
  geom_jitter(aes(colour = CONCENTRATION), shape=16,size = 2, position=position_jitter(0.2)) +
  ylim(0, 10) +
  facet_wrap(TREATMENT~Phylum, ncol =5) +
  theme_bw() +
  theme(text = element_text(size = 20)) +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = -80, hjust = 0, vjust=0.5)) +
  ggtitle("Relative abundance of selected Phylum") +
  ylab("Relative abundance")
dev.off()



# Plot  
# x = "", color ="", , facet~wrap and comparison list can be modify
pdf("Selected_Phylum_MAX_5_ABUND_Sample_type.pdf", width = 30, height = 40)
ggplot(some_Phylum, aes(x = Sample_type, y = Abundance)) +
  geom_boxplot() +
  #geom_point(aes(color = TREATMENT)) +
  geom_jitter(aes(colour = CONCENTRATION), shape=16,size = 2, position=position_jitter(0.2)) +
  ylim(0, 5) +
  facet_wrap(TREATMENT~Phylum, ncol =5) +
  theme_bw() +
  theme(text = element_text(size = 20)) +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = -80, hjust = 0, vjust=0.5)) +
  ggtitle("Relative abundance of selected Phylum") +
  ylab("Relative abundance")
dev.off()



# Plot  
# x = "", color ="", , facet~wrap and comparison list can be modify
pdf("Selected_Phylum_MAX_1_ABUND_Sample_type.pdf", width = 30, height = 40)
ggplot(some_Phylum, aes(x = Sample_type, y = Abundance)) +
  geom_boxplot() +
  #geom_point(aes(color = TREATMENT)) +
  geom_jitter(aes(colour = CONCENTRATION), shape=16,size = 2, position=position_jitter(0.2)) +
  ylim(0, 1) +
  facet_wrap(TREATMENT~Phylum, ncol =5) +
  theme_bw() +
  theme(text = element_text(size = 20)) +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = -80, hjust = 0, vjust=0.5)) +
  ggtitle("Relative abundance of selected Phylum") +
  ylab("Relative abundance")
dev.off()



# Plot  
# x = "", color ="", , facet~wrap and comparison list can be modify
pdf("Selected_Phylum_MAX_01_ABUND_Sample_type.pdf", width = 30, height = 40)
ggplot(some_Phylum, aes(x = Sample_type, y = Abundance)) +
  geom_boxplot() +
  #geom_point(aes(color = TREATMENT)) +
  geom_jitter(aes(colour = CONCENTRATION), shape=16,size = 2, position=position_jitter(0.2)) +
  ylim(0, 0.01) +
  facet_wrap(TREATMENT~Phylum, ncol =5) +
  theme_bw() +
  theme(text = element_text(size = 20)) +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = -80, hjust = 0, vjust=0.5)) +
  ggtitle("Relative abundance of selected Phylum") +
  ylab("Relative abundance")
dev.off()


###################################
#END OF TEST PLOT ONLY SPECIFIC Phylum
###################################




###################################
#TEST PLOT ONLY SPECIFIC Family
###################################


some_Family <- physeq_filtered.rel
some_Family <- tax_glom(some_Family, "Family")
#tax_table(some_Family)[,6]

some_Family <- subset_taxa(some_Family, Family == "Enterobacteriaceae"| Family == "Oscillospiraceae" 
                        |Family == "Lachnospiraceae" | Family == "Coriobacteriaceae"| Family == "Fusobacteriaceae" |
                          Family == "Streptococcaceae" | Family == "Sutterellaceae" | Family == "Ethanoligenenaceae" 
                         | Family == "Morganellaceae" | Family == "Erysipelatoclostridiaceae" | Family == "Enterococcaceae"
                         )
some_Family <- psmelt(some_Family)

# Plot  
# x = "", color ="", , facet~wrap and comparison list can be modify
pdf("Selected_Family_NO_SCALE_Sample_type.pdf", width = 30, height = 40)
ggplot(some_Family, aes(x = CONCENTRATION, y = Abundance)) +
  geom_boxplot() +
  #geom_point(aes(color = TREATMENT)) +
  geom_jitter(aes(colour = Sample_type), shape=16,size = 2, position=position_jitter(0.2)) +
  #ylim(0, 5) +
  facet_wrap(TREATMENT~Family, ncol =5) +
  theme_bw() +
  theme(text = element_text(size = 20)) +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = -80, hjust = 0, vjust=0.5)) +
  ggtitle("Relative abundance of selected Family") +
  ylab("Relative abundance")
dev.off()


# Plot  
# x = "", color ="", , facet~wrap and comparison list can be modify
pdf("Selected_Family_MAX_10_ABUND_Sample_type.pdf", width = 30, height = 40)
ggplot(some_Family, aes(x = CONCENTRATION, y = Abundance)) +
  geom_boxplot() +
  #geom_point(aes(color = TREATMENT)) +
  geom_jitter(aes(colour = Sample_type), shape=16,size = 2, position=position_jitter(0.2)) +
  ylim(0, 10) +
  facet_wrap(TREATMENT~Family, ncol =5) +
  theme_bw() +
  theme(text = element_text(size = 20)) +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = -80, hjust = 0, vjust=0.5)) +
  ggtitle("Relative abundance of selected Family") +
  ylab("Relative abundance")
dev.off()



# Plot  
# x = "", color ="", , facet~wrap and comparison list can be modify
pdf("Selected_Family_MAX_5_ABUND_Sample_type.pdf", width = 30, height = 40)
ggplot(some_Family, aes(x = CONCENTRATION, y = Abundance)) +
  geom_boxplot() +
  #geom_point(aes(color = TREATMENT)) +
  geom_jitter(aes(colour = Sample_type), shape=16,size = 2, position=position_jitter(0.2)) +
  ylim(0, 5) +
  facet_wrap(TREATMENT~Family, ncol =5) +
  theme_bw() +
  theme(text = element_text(size = 20)) +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = -80, hjust = 0, vjust=0.5)) +
  ggtitle("Relative abundance of selected Family") +
  ylab("Relative abundance")
dev.off()



# Plot  
# x = "", color ="", , facet~wrap and comparison list can be modify
pdf("Selected_Family_MAX_1_ABUND_Sample_type.pdf", width = 30, height = 40)
ggplot(some_Family, aes(x = CONCENTRATION, y = Abundance)) +
  geom_boxplot() +
  #geom_point(aes(color = TREATMENT)) +
  geom_jitter(aes(colour = Sample_type), shape=16,size = 2, position=position_jitter(0.2)) +
  ylim(0, 1) +
  facet_wrap(TREATMENT~Family, ncol =5) +
  theme_bw() +
  theme(text = element_text(size = 20)) +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = -80, hjust = 0, vjust=0.5)) +
  ggtitle("Relative abundance of selected Family") +
  ylab("Relative abundance")
dev.off()



###################################
#END OF TEST PLOT ONLY SPECIFIC Family
###################################




###################################
#TEST PLOT ONLY SPECIFIC GENERA
###################################

physeq_filtered.rel = transform_sample_counts(physeq_filtered_FECES, function(x) x/sum(x)*100)

some_Genus <- physeq_filtered.rel
some_Genus <- tax_glom(some_Genus, "Genus")
#tax_table(some_Genus)[,6]

some_Genus <- subset_taxa(some_Genus, Genus == "Prevotella"| Genus == "Veillonella" 
                        |Genus == "Blautia" |
                          Genus == "Streptococcus"| Genus == "Faecalibacterium" |
                          Genus == "Roseburia" | Genus == "Coprococcus" |
                          Genus == "Veillonella" | Genus == "Butyricicoccus" |
                          Genus == "Eubacterium" | Genus == "[Eubacterium] hallii group" | 
                         Genus == "Butyrivibrio" | Genus == "Lachnospira" |
                          Genus == "Haemophilus" | Genus == "Akkermansia" |
                         Genus == "Erysipelatoclostridium" | Genus == "Roseburia" | Genus== "Elusimicrobium"
                         )
some_Genus <- psmelt(some_Genus)

# Plot  
# x = "", color ="", , facet~wrap and comparison list can be modify
pdf("Selected_Genus_NO_SCALE_TREATMENT.pdf", width = 30, height = 40)
ggplot(some_Genus, aes(x = TREATMENT, y = Abundance)) +
  geom_boxplot() +
  #geom_point(aes(color = TREATMENT)) +
  geom_jitter(aes(colour = TREATMENT), shape=16,size = 2, position=position_jitter(0.2)) +
  #ylim(0, 5) +
  facet_wrap(~Genus, ncol = 6) +
  theme_bw() +
  theme(text = element_text(size = 20)) +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = -80, hjust = 0, vjust=0.5)) +
  ggtitle("Relative abundance of selected Genus") +
  ylab("Relative abundance")
dev.off()


# Plot  
# x = "", color ="", , facet~wrap and comparison list can be modify
pdf("Selected_Genus_MAX_10_ABUND_TREATMENT.pdf", width = 30, height = 40)
ggplot(some_Genus, aes(x = TREATMENT, y = Abundance)) +
  geom_boxplot() +
  #geom_point(aes(color = TREATMENT)) +
  geom_jitter(aes(colour = TREATMENT), shape=16,size = 2, position=position_jitter(0.2)) +
  ylim(0, 10) +
  facet_wrap(~Genus, ncol = 6) +
  theme_bw() +
  theme(text = element_text(size = 20)) +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = -80, hjust = 0, vjust=0.5)) +
  ggtitle("Relative abundance of selected Genus") +
  ylab("Relative abundance")
dev.off()



# Plot  
# x = "", color ="", , facet~wrap and comparison list can be modify
pdf("Selected_Genus_MAX_5_ABUND_TREATMENT.pdf", width = 30, height = 40)
ggplot(some_Genus, aes(x = TREATMENT, y = Abundance)) +
  geom_boxplot() +
  #geom_point(aes(color = TREATMENT)) +
  geom_jitter(aes(colour = TREATMENT), shape=16,size = 2, position=position_jitter(0.2)) +
  ylim(0, 5) +
  facet_wrap(~Genus, ncol = 6) +
  theme_bw() +
  theme(text = element_text(size = 20)) +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = -80, hjust = 0, vjust=0.5)) +
  ggtitle("Relative abundance of selected Genus") +
  ylab("Relative abundance")
dev.off()



# Plot  
# x = "", color ="", , facet~wrap and comparison list can be modify
pdf("Selected_Genus_MAX_1_ABUND_TREATMENT.pdf", width = 30, height = 40)
ggplot(some_Genus, aes(x = TREATMENT, y = Abundance)) +
  geom_boxplot() +
  #geom_point(aes(color = TREATMENT)) +
  geom_jitter(aes(colour = TREATMENT), shape=16,size = 2, position=position_jitter(0.2)) +
  ylim(0, 1) +
  facet_wrap(~Genus, ncol = 6) +
  theme_bw() +
  theme(text = element_text(size = 20)) +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = -80, hjust = 0, vjust=0.5)) +
  ggtitle("Relative abundance of selected Genus") +
  ylab("Relative abundance")
dev.off()



###################################
#END OF TEST PLOT ONLY SPECIFIC Genus
###################################

# NOW SAME FOR TREATMENT_DETAILED



#Sample_type_DETAILED


#some_Phylum <- physeq_filtered.rel
#some_Phylum <- tax_glom(some_Phylum, "Phylum")
#tax_table(some_Phylum)[,6]

#some_Phylum <- subset_taxa(some_Phylum, Phylum == "Bactroidota"| Phylum == "Firmicutes" 
#                        | Phylum == "Proteobacteria" | Phylum == "Actinobacteriota" | Phylum == "Fusobacteriota" | Phylum == #"Verrucomicrobiota")

#some_Phylum <- psmelt(some_Phylum)

# Plot  
# x = "", color ="", , facet~wrap and comparison list can be modify

pdf("Selected_Phylum_NO_SCALE_Sample_type_DETAILED_FACET_TREATMENT.pdf", width = 30, height = 40)
ggplot(some_Phylum, aes(x = Sample_type_DETAILED, y = Abundance)) +
  geom_boxplot() +
  #geom_point(aes(color = TREATMENT)) +
  geom_jitter(aes(colour = TREATMENT), shape=16,size = 2, position=position_jitter(0.2)) +
  #ylim(0, 5) +
  facet_wrap(TREATMENT~Phylum, ncol =5) +
  theme_bw() +
  theme(text = element_text(size = 20)) +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = -80, hjust = 0, vjust=0.5)) +
  ggtitle("Relative abundance of selected Phylum") +
  ylab("Relative abundance")
dev.off()


# Plot  
# x = "", color ="", , facet~wrap and comparison list can be modify
pdf("Selected_Phylum_MAX_10_ABUND_Sample_type_DETAILED_FACET_TREATMENT.pdf", width = 30, height = 40)
ggplot(some_Phylum, aes(x = Sample_type_DETAILED, y = Abundance)) +
  geom_boxplot() +
  #geom_point(aes(color = TREATMENT)) +
  geom_jitter(aes(colour = TREATMENT), shape=16,size = 2, position=position_jitter(0.2)) +
  ylim(0, 10) +
  facet_wrap(TREATMENT~Phylum, ncol =5) +
  theme_bw() +
  theme(text = element_text(size = 20)) +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = -80, hjust = 0, vjust=0.5)) +
  ggtitle("Relative abundance of selected Phylum") +
  ylab("Relative abundance")
dev.off()



# Plot  
# x = "", color ="", , facet~wrap and comparison list can be modify
pdf("Selected_Phylum_MAX_5_ABUND_Sample_type_DETAILED_FACET_TREATMENT.pdf", width = 30, height = 40)
ggplot(some_Phylum, aes(x = Sample_type_DETAILED, y = Abundance)) +
  geom_boxplot() +
  #geom_point(aes(color = TREATMENT)) +
  geom_jitter(aes(colour = TREATMENT), shape=16,size = 2, position=position_jitter(0.2)) +
  ylim(0, 5) +
  facet_wrap(TREATMENT~Phylum, ncol =5) +
  theme_bw() +
  theme(text = element_text(size = 20)) +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = -80, hjust = 0, vjust=0.5)) +
  ggtitle("Relative abundance of selected Phylum") +
  ylab("Relative abundance")
dev.off()



# Plot  
# x = "", color ="", , facet~wrap and comparison list can be modify
pdf("Selected_Phylum_MAX_1_ABUND_Sample_type_DETAILED_FACET_TREATMENT.pdf", width = 30, height = 40)
ggplot(some_Phylum, aes(x = Sample_type_DETAILED, y = Abundance)) +
  geom_boxplot() +
  #geom_point(aes(color = TREATMENT)) +
  geom_jitter(aes(colour = TREATMENT), shape=16,size = 2, position=position_jitter(0.2)) +
  ylim(0, 1) +
  facet_wrap(TREATMENT~Phylum, ncol =5) +
  theme_bw() +
  theme(text = element_text(size = 20)) +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = -80, hjust = 0, vjust=0.5)) +
  ggtitle("Relative abundance of selected Phylum") +
  ylab("Relative abundance")
dev.off()



# Plot  
# x = "", color ="", , facet~wrap and comparison list can be modify
pdf("Selected_Phylum_MAX_01_ABUND_Sample_type_DETAILED_FACET_TREATMENT.pdf", width = 30, height = 40)
ggplot(some_Phylum, aes(x = Sample_type_DETAILED, y = Abundance)) +
  geom_boxplot() +
  #geom_point(aes(color = TREATMENT)) +
  geom_jitter(aes(colour = TREATMENT), shape=16,size = 2, position=position_jitter(0.2)) +
  ylim(0, 0.01) +
  facet_wrap(TREATMENT~Phylum, ncol =5) +
  theme_bw() +
  theme(text = element_text(size = 20)) +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = -80, hjust = 0, vjust=0.5)) +
  ggtitle("Relative abundance of selected Phylum") +
  ylab("Relative abundance")
dev.off()


###################################
#END OF TEST PLOT ONLY SPECIFIC Phylum
###################################




###################################
#TEST PLOT ONLY SPECIFIC Family
###################################


#some_Family <- physeq_filtered.rel
#some_Family <- tax_glom(some_Family, "Family")
#tax_table(some_Family)[,6]

#some_Family <- subset_taxa(some_Family, Family == "Enterobacteriaceae"| Family == "Oscillospiraceae" 
#                        |Family == "Lachnospiraceae" | Family == "Coriobacteriaceae"| Family == "Fusobacteriaceae" |
#                          Family == "Streptococcaceae" | Family == "Sutterellaceae" | Family == "Ethanoligenenaceae" 
#                         | Family == "Morganellaceae" | Family == "Erysipelatoclostridiaceae" | Family == "Enterococcaceae"
#                         )
#some_Family <- psmelt(some_Family)

# Plot  
# x = "", color ="", , facet~wrap and comparison list can be modify
pdf("Selected_Family_NO_SCALE_Sample_type_DETAILED_FACET_TREATMENT.pdf", width = 30, height = 40)
ggplot(some_Family, aes(x = CONCENTRATION, y = Abundance)) +
  geom_boxplot() +
  #geom_point(aes(color = TREATMENT)) +
  geom_jitter(aes(colour = Sample_type_DETAILED), shape=16,size = 2, position=position_jitter(0.2)) +
  #ylim(0, 5) +
  facet_wrap(TREATMENT~Family, ncol =5) +
  theme_bw() +
  theme(text = element_text(size = 20)) +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = -80, hjust = 0, vjust=0.5)) +
  ggtitle("Relative abundance of selected Family") +
  ylab("Relative abundance")
dev.off()


# Plot  
# x = "", color ="", , facet~wrap and comparison list can be modify
pdf("Selected_Family_MAX_10_ABUND_Sample_type_DETAILED_FACET_TREATMENT.pdf", width = 30, height = 40)
ggplot(some_Family, aes(x = CONCENTRATION, y = Abundance)) +
  geom_boxplot() +
  #geom_point(aes(color = TREATMENT)) +
  geom_jitter(aes(colour = Sample_type_DETAILED), shape=16,size = 2, position=position_jitter(0.2)) +
  ylim(0, 10) +
  facet_wrap(TREATMENT~Family, ncol =5) +
  theme_bw() +
  theme(text = element_text(size = 20)) +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = -80, hjust = 0, vjust=0.5)) +
  ggtitle("Relative abundance of selected Family") +
  ylab("Relative abundance")
dev.off()



# Plot  
# x = "", color ="", , facet~wrap and comparison list can be modify
pdf("Selected_Family_MAX_5_ABUND_Sample_type_DETAILED_FACET_TREATMENT.pdf", width = 30, height = 40)
ggplot(some_Family, aes(x = CONCENTRATION, y = Abundance)) +
  geom_boxplot() +
  #geom_point(aes(color = TREATMENT)) +
  geom_jitter(aes(colour = Sample_type_DETAILED), shape=16,size = 2, position=position_jitter(0.2)) +
  ylim(0, 5) +
  facet_wrap(TREATMENT~Family, ncol =5) +
  theme_bw() +
  theme(text = element_text(size = 20)) +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = -80, hjust = 0, vjust=0.5)) +
  ggtitle("Relative abundance of selected Family") +
  ylab("Relative abundance")
dev.off()



# Plot  
# x = "", color ="", , facet~wrap and comparison list can be modify
pdf("Selected_Family_MAX_1_ABUND_Sample_type_DETAILED_FACET_TREATMENT.pdf", width = 30, height = 40)
ggplot(some_Family, aes(x = CONCENTRATION, y = Abundance)) +
  geom_boxplot() +
  #geom_point(aes(color = TREATMENT)) +
  geom_jitter(aes(colour = Sample_type_DETAILED), shape=16,size = 2, position=position_jitter(0.2)) +
  ylim(0, 1) +
  facet_wrap(TREATMENT~Family, ncol =5) +
  theme_bw() +
  theme(text = element_text(size = 20)) +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = -80, hjust = 0, vjust=0.5)) +
  ggtitle("Relative abundance of selected Family") +
  ylab("Relative abundance")
dev.off()



###################################
#END OF TEST PLOT ONLY SPECIFIC Family
###################################

#TEST PLOT ONLY SPECIFIC GENERA
###################################

#physeq_filtered.rel = transform_sample_counts(physeq_filtered, function(x) x/sum(x)*100)

#some_Genus <- physeq_filtered.rel
#some_Genus <- tax_glom(some_Genus, "Genus")
#tax_table(some_Genus)[,6]

#some_Genus <- subset_taxa(some_Genus, Genus == "Prevotella"| Genus == "Veillonella" 
#                        |Genus == "Blautia" |
#                          Genus == "Streptococcus"| Genus == "Faecalibacterium" |
#                          Genus == "Roseburia" | Genus == "Coprococcus" |
#                          Genus == "Veillonella" | Genus == "Butyricicoccus" |
#                          Genus == "Eubacterium" | Genus == "[Eubacterium] hallii group" | 
#                         Genus == "Butyrivibrio" | Genus == "Lachnospira" |
#                          Genus == "Haemophilus" | Genus == "Akkermansia" |
#                         Genus == "Erysipelatoclostridium" | Genus == "Roseburia" | Genus== "Elusimicrobium"
#                         )
#some_Genus <- psmelt(some_Genus)

# Plot  
# x = "", color ="", , facet~wrap and comparison list can be modify
pdf("Selected_Genus_NO_SCALE_Sample_type_DETAILED_FACET_TREATMENT.pdf", width = 30, height = 40)
ggplot(some_Genus, aes(x = Sample_type_DETAILED, y = Abundance)) +
  geom_boxplot() +
  #geom_point(aes(color = TREATMENT)) +
  geom_jitter(aes(colour = CONCENTRATION), shape=16,size = 2, position=position_jitter(0.2)) +
  #ylim(0, 5) +
  facet_wrap(~Genus, ncol = 5) +
  theme_bw() +
  theme(text = element_text(size = 20)) +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = -80, hjust = 0, vjust=0.5)) +
  ggtitle("Relative abundance of selected Genus") +
  ylab("Relative abundance")
dev.off()


# Plot  
# x = "", color ="", , facet~wrap and comparison list can be modify
pdf("Selected_Genus_MAX_10_ABUND_Sample_type_DETAILED_FACET_TREATMENT.pdf", width = 30, height = 40)
ggplot(some_Genus, aes(x = Sample_type_DETAILED, y = Abundance)) +
  geom_boxplot() +
  #geom_point(aes(color = TREATMENT)) +
  geom_jitter(aes(colour = CONCENTRATION), shape=16,size = 2, position=position_jitter(0.2)) +
  ylim(0, 10) +
  facet_wrap(~Genus, ncol = 5) +
  theme_bw() +
  theme(text = element_text(size = 20)) +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = -80, hjust = 0, vjust=0.5)) +
  ggtitle("Relative abundance of selected Genus") +
  ylab("Relative abundance")
dev.off()



# Plot  
# x = "", color ="", , facet~wrap and comparison list can be modify
pdf("Selected_Genus_MAX_5_ABUND_Sample_type_DETAILED_FACET_TREATMENT.pdf", width = 30, height = 40)
ggplot(some_Genus, aes(x = Sample_type_DETAILED, y = Abundance)) +
  geom_boxplot() +
  #geom_point(aes(color = TREATMENT)) +
  geom_jitter(aes(colour = CONCENTRATION), shape=16,size = 2, position=position_jitter(0.2)) +
  ylim(0, 5) +
  facet_wrap(~Genus, ncol = 5) +
  theme_bw() +
  theme(text = element_text(size = 20)) +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = -80, hjust = 0, vjust=0.5)) +
  ggtitle("Relative abundance of selected Genus") +
  ylab("Relative abundance")
dev.off()



# Plot  
# x = "", color ="", , facet~wrap and comparison list can be modify
pdf("Selected_Genus_MAX_1_ABUND_Sample_type_DETAILED_FACET_TREATMENT.pdf", width = 30, height = 40)
ggplot(some_Genus, aes(x = Sample_type_DETAILED, y = Abundance)) +
  geom_boxplot() +
  #geom_point(aes(color = TREATMENT)) +
  geom_jitter(aes(colour = CONCENTRATION), shape=16,size = 2, position=position_jitter(0.2)) +
  ylim(0, 1) +
  facet_wrap(~Genus, ncol = 5) +
  theme_bw() +
  theme(text = element_text(size = 20)) +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = -80, hjust = 0, vjust=0.5)) +
  ggtitle("Relative abundance of selected Genus") +
  ylab("Relative abundance")
dev.off()

#END OF TEST PLOT ONLY SPECIFIC Genus
###################################





#Sample_type_DETAILED FACET TREATMENT


#some_Phylum <- physeq_filtered.rel
#some_Phylum <- tax_glom(some_Phylum, "Phylum")
#tax_table(some_Phylum)[,6]

#some_Phylum <- subset_taxa(some_Phylum, Phylum == "Bactroidota"| Phylum == "Firmicutes" 
#                        | Phylum == "Proteobacteria" | Phylum == "Actinobacteriota" | Phylum == "Fusobacteriota" | Phylum == #"Verrucomicrobiota")

#some_Phylum <- psmelt(some_Phylum)

# Plot  
# x = "", color ="", , facet~wrap and comparison list can be modify

pdf("Selected_Phylum_NO_SCALE_Sample_type_DETAILED_FACET_TREATMENT.pdf", width = 30, height = 40)
ggplot(some_Phylum, aes(x = Sample_type_DETAILED, y = Abundance)) +
  geom_boxplot() +
  #geom_point(aes(color = TREATMENT)) +
  geom_jitter(aes(colour = CONCENTRATION), shape=16,size = 2, position=position_jitter(0.2)) +
  #ylim(0, 5) +
  facet_wrap(TREATMENT~Phylum, ncol =5) +
  theme_bw() +
  theme(text = element_text(size = 20)) +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = -80, hjust = 0, vjust=0.5)) +
  ggtitle("Relative abundance of selected Phylum") +
  ylab("Relative abundance")
dev.off()

# x = "", color ="", , facet~wrap and comparison list can be modify
pdf("Selected_Phylum_MAX_10_ABUND_Sample_type_DETAILED_FACET_TREATMENT.pdf", width = 30, height = 40)
